etimes‘The coolest McDonald’s’ has a real airplane inside — and people can eat there: Guess which country it’s inA McDonald's in Taupo, New Zealand, is drawing crowds with its unique dining space: a retired Douglas DC-3 airplane. Diners can now eat inside the vintage aircraft, complete with its original, well-preserved cockpit. This unusual concept, featuring a plane measuring nearly 65 feet long, has sparked widespread social media buzz and excitement among aviation enthusiasts.

etimesMeet Asproulis: Greece's miracle dog who survived 9 days starving on a 1900m icy peak!A nine-month-old dog named Asproulis, meaning "Whitey," survived nine days stranded on a frozen Greek peak after following skiers. His faint cries were heard by mountaineers who found him weak and brought him down. The ordeal highlights the resilience of animals and the kindness of strangers.
